note: 05-31 full window (59 completed runs, 89.8%). 6 failures, 5 distinct classes. Two recurrence classes strengthened (token-budget-429 #35661 2nd day; safe-output partial-failure intolerance 2 more workflows). 1 new infra (threat-detection prompt missing). 2 transient PR-branch-deleted-race failures.

anomalies.t: ESCALATING & highest-leverage: one failed safe-output item red-fails the WHOLE safe_outputs job even when others succeeded. Today TWO workflows: Sub-Issue Closer (11 add_comment target=* no-number failed despite 11 successful update_issue) and LintMonster (assign_to_agent #36048/#36049 API errors despite 3 create_issue + 1 create_discussion succeeding). Class now spans 4 workflows since 05-26. Needs partial-failure tolerance (skip-with-warning when >=1 item ok) + emit-time target=* validation + investigate assign_to_agent API failure.

RECURRING (2nd consecutive day, different workflow): Daily Firewall Logs Collector blew the 25M effective-token cap (25.41M/25M) -> CAPIError 429 -> 4 --continue retries re-hit the cap -> exitCode=1 after 18m25s. Same signature as 05-30 Linter Miner (25.13M/25M). Documentation Noob Tester hit 25.03M eff_tok and barely SUCCEEDED — at the cliff edge. Open #35661. Needs scope chunking on heavy daily-aggregation workflows + harness fail-fast on budget-429.

NEW infra: Code Simplifier (26703540010) agent succeeded and produced a valid PR patch, but the DETECTION job failed because the threat-detection prompt.txt was missing (cp masked by '|| true') -> detection agent exit 1 -> no THREAT_DETECTION_RESULT -> parse fail -> run red. Shared detection harness exposes any create_pull_request workflow with a missing prompt at detection time. Fix: verify the prompt exists (don't mask cp failure) and fail with a clear error or regenerate it.

TRANSIENT (external cause): 2 PR-event runs on head branch 'copilot/update-agentic-workflows-and-skill-file' which no longer existed on the remote. Test Quality Sentinel (26700870332) -> git fetch exit 22, 0 turns; Design Decision Gate (26700870336, claude) -> push_to_pull_request_branch failed at 21 turns. PR branch merged/deleted while these workflows were queued. Low priority; a checkout guard could skip-cleanly on a deleted branch instead of red-failing.

NEW cost outlier (but a SUCCESS): Go Logger Enhancement (claude/opus) $8.30 / 41.9M eff_tok / 117 turns — the day's most expensive run and a new daily-cost high above the prior $7.15 peak. Succeeded, so value-for-cost, but the heavy tail (117 turns) is worth watching for repeat.

89.8% completion (53/59) on a full window. 13-window trend: 92.78 -> 88.89 -> 85.9 -> 75.6 -> 41.6 -> 81.1 -> 94.7 -> 85.7 -> 90.9 -> 81.0 -> 89.5 -> 91.1 -> 89.8. Stable in the high-80s/low-90s band; the 6 failures are 5 distinct classes, no single systemic regression. Note 3 runs still in-progress at audit time (incl. this audit + the Failure Investigator).

Top cost (claude-measured): Go Logger Enhancement $8.30 (success, NEW high), Safe Output Health Monitor $5.24, Sergo $4.29, Static Analysis Report $3.11, Design Decision Gate $1.62 (failed). Top eff_tok: Go Logger Enhancement 41.9M, Daily Firewall Logs 25.4M (429-failed), Documentation Noob Tester 25.0M (at-cap success), Safe Output Health Monitor 23.8M, Copilot CLI Deep Research 23.1M. Total $31.63 is claude-biased (copilot/codex EstimatedCost=0).
RESOLVED: 2nd consecutive clean window; no exit-128 'not in a git directory' signatures.
Did not recur on 05-31. Continue monitoring the MCP 'client is closing: EOF' cluster on main after the merged gateway-bump PR #35973.
